html:
Exclusive to:

The Pleasant Portrait is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs, 2 Twigs, 1 Gold Nugget and 1 Feather Pencil and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

It can be placed on a Wooden Table.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Distinguished The Squeal Issued for free on the eve of Halloween in 2023
Woven - Distinguished
Decorator's Collection
Merm with a Pearl Earring
Mermeer's masterpiece.
Woven - Distinguished
Fantasmical Collection
The Birth of Mermus
The Beauty born of the swamp.
Woven - Distinguished
Hallowed Nighst Collection
The Squeal
Is he squealing with delight... or de-fright?
Woven - Distinguished
Parlor's Collection
The Fall
It was no fairy tale ending.
Woven - Distinguished
Cawnival Collection
The Blue Boid
This fledgling crow stands boldly in defiant blue hue attire.
Woven - Distinguished
Rose Collection
The Wain
The cultivated Catcoon.

Trivia

  • The Pleasant Portrait was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
  • This painting appears to be a reference to American Gothic by Grant DeVolson Wood. Skins for Portrait are also references to other painting.
    • Skin "Merm with a Pearl Earring" is a reference to "Girl with a Pearl Earring"
    • Skin "The Birth of Mermus" is a reference to "The Birth of Venus"
    • Skin "The Squeal" is a reference to "The Scream". Using "squeal" instead of "scream" could be reference to the music term "Pig Squeal"
    • Skin "The Fall" is a reference to "The Kiss"
    • Skin "The Blue Boid" is a reference to "The Blue Boy". Word "Boid" could be reference to the term Boids.

Assets

  • Pleasant Portrait Dropped
  • The Fall Dropped
  • The Blue Boid Dropped
  • The Wain Dropped

Gallery

  • Old Pleasant Portrait Dropped
  • Pleasant Portrait placed on a Round Wooden Table
  • Pleasant Portrait skins concept art from Rhymes with Play
  • Pleasant Portrait concept art from Rhymes with Play
  • All skins in the game

Pleasant Portrait
"Frame your friends, it's fun!"
Object Info
Perk
Can be placed on a Wooden Table.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×2 ×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"decor_portraitframe"
Exclusive to:
“Looking good!”
–Wilson
“It's missing the fire in their eyes.”
–Willow
“Next draw Wolfgang's good side!”
–Wolfgang
“In the end, all we have are pictures.”
–Wendy
“I WILL TOLERATE IT”
–WX-78
“A decent resemblance.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's their spitting image!”
–Woodie
“My my, aren't we special.”
–Maxwell
“A fallen cömrade?”
–Wigfrid
“Are we handsome?”
–Webber
“I long to see the face of Maman.”
–Warly
“Oh! Hello!”
–Wormwood
“It's a pretty good likeness.”
–Winona
“A picture perfect portrait.”
–Wortox
“It hard to draw with claws...”
–Wurt
“It really looks like them! Right, Woby?”
–Walter
“A moment captured in time.”
–Wanda
The Pleasant Portrait is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter with 2 Logs, 2 Twigs, 1 Gold Nugget and 1 Feather Pencil and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.
It can be placed on a Wooden Table.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Pleasant Portrait was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.
This painting appears to be a reference to American Gothic by Grant DeVolson Wood. Skins for Portrait are also references to other painting.
Skin "Merm with a Pearl Earring" is a reference to "Girl with a Pearl Earring"
Skin "The Birth of Mermus" is a reference to "The Birth of Venus"
Skin "The Squeal" is a reference to "The Scream". Using "squeal" instead of "scream" could be reference to the music term "Pig Squeal"
Skin "The Fall" is a reference to "The Kiss"
Skin "The Blue Boid" is a reference to "The Blue Boy". Word "Boid" could be reference to the term Boids.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Chân dung dễ chịu là một Vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond. Nó có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ Lọc Trang Trí hoặc Bộ Lọc Mộc với 2 Gỗ, 2 Cành Cây, 1 Thỏi Vàng và 1 Bút Chì Lông Vũ và yêu cầu Ngựa bàn cưa để tạo nguyên mẫu.

Right, Woby? |wanda = A moment captured in time. |choose = wolfgang }} The '''Pleasant Portrait''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced within the ''[[From Beyond]]'' updates. It can be crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]] or [[Carpentry Filter]] with 2 [[Log]]s, 2 [[Twigs]], 1 [[Gold Nugget]] and 1 [[Feather Pencil]] and requires a [[Sawhorse]] to prototype. Skins for Portrait are also references to other painting. ** Skin "Merm with a Pearl Earring" is a reference to "[[wikipedia:Girl_with_a_Pearl_Earring|Girl with a Pearl Earring]]" ** Skin "The Birth of Mermus" is a reference to "[[wikipedia:The_Birth_of_Venus|The Birth of Venus]]" ** Skin "The Squeal" is a reference to "[[wikipedia:The_Scream|The Scream]]".
